# Competitive Capabilities

State summary: 11 shipped, 1 partial, 0 proposed.

This page is generated from `bubbles/capability-ledger.yaml` and is the source-backed view of how Bubbles positions key framework capabilities against adjacent tools.

| Capability | State | Summary | Competitor Pressure | Docs | Evidence | Issues |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Workflow orchestration | shipped | Universal natural-language workflow entry point backed by explicit specialist orchestration and mode routing. | claude-code, roo-code, cursor, cline | [README.md](../../README.md); [docs/guides/WORKFLOW_MODES.md](../guides/WORKFLOW_MODES.md) | `bubbles/workflows.yaml`<br>bubbles/workflows.yaml, agents/bubbles.workflow.agent.md | — |
| Hard artifact ownership | shipped | Specialist-owned artifacts and routing gates prevent cross-owner edits and keep remediation packets precise. | claude-code, roo-code | [README.md](../../README.md); [agents/bubbles_shared/artifact-ownership.md](../../agents/bubbles_shared/artifact-ownership.md) | `bubbles/agent-ownership.yaml`<br>bubbles/agent-ownership.yaml, bubbles/workflows.yaml | — |
| Validate-owned certification | shipped | Certification authority stays with bubbles.validate and state.json ownership instead of leaking into execution agents. | claude-code, cursor | [README.md](../../README.md); [docs/guides/CONTROL_PLANE_DESIGN.md](../guides/CONTROL_PLANE_DESIGN.md) | `agents/bubbles_shared/artifact-ownership.md`<br>agents/bubbles_shared/artifact-ownership.md, agents/bubbles_shared/agent-common.md | — |

| Session-aware runtime coordination | shipped | Runtime lease coordination is shipped — `runtime-leases.sh` provides acquire/attach/release/heartbeat/doctor/reclaim-stale operations with compatibility fingerprints, share modes (shared-compatible / exclusive / disposable / persistent-protected), and stale-lease takeover semantics; wired into `bubbles/scripts/cli.sh` (`runtime` subcommand, `status`, `doctor`) and `framework-validate.sh` (selftest). | claude-code, roo-code, cursor | [docs/issues/session-aware-runtime-coordination.md](../issues/session-aware-runtime-coordination.md); [docs/generated/issue-status.md](../generated/issue-status.md); [docs/guides/CONTROL_PLANE_DESIGN.md](../guides/CONTROL_PLANE_DESIGN.md); [docs/guides/CONTROL_PLANE_SCHEMAS.md](../guides/CONTROL_PLANE_SCHEMAS.md) | `bubbles/scripts/runtime-leases.sh`<br>bubbles/scripts/runtime-leases.sh, bubbles/scripts/runtime-lease-selftest.sh, bubbles/scripts/cli.sh, bubbles/scripts/framework-validate.sh, docs/issues/session-aware-runtime-coordination.md | [session-aware-runtime-coordination.md](../issues/session-aware-runtime-coordination.md) |
| G068 DoD-Gherkin fidelity threshold tuning | shipped | G068 overlap heuristic now uses 3-char min word length, a trimmed true-stop-word exclusion list, and a percentage threshold (>=50%) with a >=3 absolute floor — false-positive matching for legitimate DoD items is resolved. | cline, roo-code | [docs/issues/G068-word-overlap-threshold.md](../issues/G068-word-overlap-threshold.md); [docs/generated/issue-status.md](../generated/issue-status.md) | `bubbles/scripts/state-transition-guard.sh`<br>bubbles/scripts/state-transition-guard.sh, bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh, docs/issues/G068-word-overlap-threshold.md | [G068-word-overlap-threshold.md](../issues/G068-word-overlap-threshold.md) |
| Orchestrator context compaction | shipped | Orchestrator agents (workflow, sprint, goal, iterate) compact accumulated subagent RESULT-ENVELOPEs into structured ledger entries before context pressure causes truncation or fabrication. Helper script (`bubbles/scripts/context-compactor.sh`) plus per-agent integration documented in `agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md`. Modeled after SWE-agent style in-loop runtime context compaction. | claude-code, roo-code | [agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md](../../agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md); [agents/bubbles.workflow.agent.md](../../agents/bubbles.workflow.agent.md); [agents/bubbles.sprint.agent.md](../../agents/bubbles.sprint.agent.md); [agents/bubbles.goal.agent.md](../../agents/bubbles.goal.agent.md); [agents/bubbles.iterate.agent.md](../../agents/bubbles.iterate.agent.md) | `bubbles/scripts/context-compactor.sh`<br>bubbles/scripts/context-compactor.sh, bubbles/scripts/context-compactor-selftest.sh, agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md | — |
| Per-turn state snapshot | shipped | Orchestrator agents emit a turn-start and turn-end snapshot to `.specify/memory/bubbles.session.json` under a `turnSnapshots[]` array on every multi-turn cycle. Each record carries `turnNumber`, `timestamp`, `phase`, `scopeId`, `mode`, `note`, and `agent`. Enables deterministic resume-after-crash and a per-turn audit trail for compliance. Helper script `bubbles/scripts/state-snapshot.sh` plus pattern documented in `agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md`. Modeled after SWE-agent trajectory persistence. | claude-code, roo-code | [agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md](../../agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md) | `bubbles/scripts/state-snapshot.sh`<br>bubbles/scripts/state-snapshot.sh, bubbles/scripts/state-snapshot-selftest.sh, agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md | — |
| Linter-on-edit gate | shipped | Project-pluggable linter trampoline. Downstream projects register language-specific linters via `.specify/memory/bubbles.config.json` under `editLintGate.linters`; the framework supplies the gate dispatcher (`bubbles/scripts/edit-lint-gate.sh`). Default state is no-op (opt-in only) to preserve framework agnosticity — the framework MUST NOT bundle default linters. Pattern documented in `agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md`. Modeled after SWE-agent linter integration. | claude-code, roo-code | [agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md](../../agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md) | `bubbles/scripts/edit-lint-gate.sh`<br>bubbles/scripts/edit-lint-gate.sh, bubbles/scripts/edit-lint-gate-selftest.sh, agents/bubbles_shared/operating-baseline.md | — |
